title: Contracts & Commercial Executive (M&E)
description:
Your new company
A leading property developer with a diverse portfolio is seeking for a Contracts & Commercial Executive. You will play a key role in ensuring that all Mechanical & Electrical (M&E) goods and services are procured efficiently, cost‑effectively, and in compliance with organizational standards. Centrally located in Singapore
Your new role

  • Managing end‑to‑end procurement activities for M&E categories, including sourcing, negotiation, and vendor selection
  • Preparing, reviewing, and administering contracts, purchase orders, and tender documents
  • Evaluating suppliers on quality, reliability, pricing, and service performance
  • Supporting project teams on procurement timelines to ensure smooth project execution
  • Monitoring contract performance, variations, and compliance with organizational policies
  • Coordinating with internal stakeholders, consultants, and contractors to ensure procurement needs are met
  • Maintaining accurate procurement records and ensuring adherence to audit requirements

What you'll need to succeed

  • A Degree in Engineering, Supply Chain, Business, or related discipline
  • At least 4 years of experience in procurement, contracts administration, or M&E–related functions
  • Ideally someone from main contractor
  • Strong understanding of M&E materials, services, or industry practices
  • Excellent negotiation, analytical, and communication skills
  • Strong attention to detail and the ability to manage multiple priorities
  • A proactive team player with a positive working attitude

What you'll get in return

  • Be part of a reputable and market‑leading property developer
  • Work in a collaborative and growth‑focused environment
  • Opportunities for career development within a diverse portfolio of businesses

What you need to do now
If you're keen on pursuing this exciting opportunity, please send a copy of your CV (word document) to belinder.kaur@hays.com.sg (Registration ID No. R1545727) EA Licence No.: 07C3924 Company's Registration number: 200609504D

We are the experts in recruiting qualified, professional and skilled people across a wide range of specialised industries and professions. We operate across the private and public sectors, dealing in permanent positions, contract roles and temporary assignments.

At Hays, we believe the right job can transform a person's life and the right person can transform a business. We're passionate about connecting our candidates with the right job for them.
